title: enkleia paniculata
intro: Enkleia paniculata, also known as Elsholtzia, is a perennial plant in the mint family native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Enkleia paniculata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. Enkleia paniculata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
